zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Welles於大約1226年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比時，他的父親William de Welles40歲，母親Emma Grainsby37歲。他於1254年與Isabel Periton在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年9月24日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格利姆斯比享年40歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Welles于大约1226年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比时，他的父亲William de Welles40岁，母亲Emma Grainsby37岁。他于1254年与Isabel Periton在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年9月24日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾格利姆斯比享年40岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Welles was born about 1226, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Welles, was 40 and his mother, Emma Grainsby, was 37. He married Isabel Periton in 1254, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 September 1265, in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Welles est né environ 1226, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Welles, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Emma Grainsby, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Periton en 1254, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1265, à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Welles um 1226 in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Welles 40 und seine Mutter Emma Grainsby 37. Er hat 1254 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Periton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. September 1265 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Welles è nato il circa 1226 nel Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Welles, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Emma Grainsby, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Periton nel 1254, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 settembre 1265, nel Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Wellesが約1226年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで生まれた時，父William de Wellesは40歳，母Emma Grainsbyは37歳であった。1254年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでIsabel Peritonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年9月24日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーで40歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Welles(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Welles(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Grainsby(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Isabel Periton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 9월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 그림스비에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 그림스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Welles nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Welles, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Emma Grainsby, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Periton em 1254, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1265, em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Welles родился около 1226 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Welles было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Grainsby, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Periton в 1254 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 сентября 1265 г. в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Welles nació aproximadamente 1226, en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Welles, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Emma Grainsby, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Isabel Periton en 1254, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1265, en Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
